messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Annual School Board Review' for local education administrators. The deck needs 20 slides following an academic theme with traditional serif fonts and muted colors. Write all content in English and set the slide size to 4:3 Standard orientation. Save the final file as school_review.pptx. Do not use external APIs or web scraping. You are required to use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, you must check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text on the title shape. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import ChartData
import os

# ── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10.0)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT

# Color palette (muted academic)
NAVY = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x3A, 0x5C)
BURGUNDY = RGBColor(0x8B, 0x2E, 0x4F)
GOLD = RGBColor(0xC9, 0xA9, 0x6E)
CREAM = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF0, 0xE6)
CHARCOAL = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x2D, 0x2D)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xED, 0xE7, 0xDB)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6B, 0x6B, 0x6B)

# Fonts
FONT_HEADING = "Georgia"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_ACCENT = "Times New Roman"

OUTPUT_FILE = "school_review.pptx"


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    """Fill the slide background with a solid color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_name=FONT_BODY,
                 font_size=14, bold=False, color=CHARCOAL, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    """Create a formatted text box."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = font_name
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    """Add a rounded rectangle card with optional colored border."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(
        MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height
    )
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, section_num):
    """Add a numbered section header with decorative line."""
    left = MARGIN_LEFT
    top = Inches(0.35)
    width = CONTENT_WIDTH

    # Section number badge
    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    badge.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.05), top + Inches(0.02), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.36),
                 str(section_num), font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Label text
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.55), top + Inches(0.02), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.36),
                 label_text, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=18, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    # Decorative line
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(0.55), top + Inches(0.42),
                                  Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=20):
    """Add a footer with district name and page number."""
    left = MARGIN_LEFT
    top = Inches(7.1)
    width = CONTENT_WIDTH

    # Thin gold line above footer
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top - Inches(0.08),
                                  width, Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left, top + Inches(0.05), width, Inches(0.15),
                 "District School Board — Annual Review", font_name=FONT_BODY,
                 font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, slide.shapes[-1].left + Inches(4.5), top + Inches(0.05),
                 Inches(2), Inches(0.15),
                 f"Slide {slide_num} of {total}", font_name=FONT_BODY,
                 font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text="Image"):
    """Insert image if file exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY, border_color=GOLD)
        # Add icon-like cross
        h_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE,
                                        left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.25),
                                        Inches(1.4), Pt(2))
        h_line.fill.solid()
        h_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
        h_line.line.fill.background()
        v_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE,
                                        left + Inches(0.95), top + Inches(0.15),
                                        Pt(2), Inches(1.2))
        v_line.fill.solid()
        v_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
        v_line.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.45),
                     Inches(1.4), Inches(0.6), alt_text, font_name=FONT_BODY,
                     font_size=10, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(7), Inches(0.9),
                 "Annual School Board Review", font_name=FONT_HEADING,
                 font_size=36, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Gold accent bar
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.2), Inches(2.85),
                                 Inches(1.6), Pt(4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.1), Inches(7), Inches(0.5),
                 "District of Excellence — Fiscal Year 2024–2025", font_name=FONT_ACCENT,
                 font_size=18, color=BURGUNDY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(7), Inches(0.4),
                 "Presented to Local Education Administrators", font_name=FONT_BODY,
                 font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(6.2), Inches(7), Inches(0.3),
                 "Prepared by the Office of the Superintendent", font_name=FONT_BODY,
                 font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Agenda"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_footer(slide, 2)

    items = [
        ("01", "District Overview & Mission"),
        ("02", "Student Enrollment Trends"),
        ("03", "Academic Performance Metrics"),
        ("04", "Graduation Rates & Test Scores"),
        ("05", "Teacher Quality & Retention"),
        ("06", "Budget & Financial Summary"),
        ("07", "Capital Projects & Technology"),
        ("08", "Strategic Goals & Action Items"),
    ]

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(items):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + col * Inches(4.75)
        top = Inches(1.3) + row * Inches(0.85)

        card = add_card(slide, left, top, Inches(4.5), Inches(0.7), bg_color=CREAM, border_color=GOLD)

        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     num, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=18, bold=True, color=BURGUNDY)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.9), top + Inches(0.2), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.35),
                     label, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=14, color=CHARCOAL)


def build_district_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "District Overview & Mission"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_section_label(slide, "Our District at a Glance", 1)
    add_footer(slide, 3)

    # Mission statement card
    mission_card = add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.2), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.9), bg_color=NAVY)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), Inches(1.35), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7),
                 "Mission: To provide equitable, high-quality education that prepares every student for college, career, and civic life.",
                 font_name=FONT_ACCENT, font_size=14, color=WHITE)

    # Stats cards in a row
    stats = [
        ("28", "Schools"),
        ("32,500", "Students"),
        ("2,850", "Staff Members"),
        ("96%", "Community Satisfaction"),
    ]
    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(stats):
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + i * Inches(2.4)
        card = add_card(slide, left, Inches(2.3), Inches(2.2), Inches(1.5), bg_color=CREAM, border_color=GOLD)

        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), Inches(2.45), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.7),
                     value, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=32, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), Inches(3.15), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.4),
                     label, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Key initiatives text
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.1), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.35),
                 "Key Initiatives", font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=16, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    initiatives = [
        "STEM Excellence Program — Expanded to all middle schools",
        "Literacy First Initiative — Targeted reading support for grades K–3",
        "Equity & Access Framework — Ensuring opportunity for every learner",
        "Professional Development — 40 hours per teacher annually",
    ]
    y = Inches(4.5)
    for init in initiatives:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.2), y, CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     f"• {init}", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, color=CHARCOAL)
        y += Inches(0.35)


def build_enrollment_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Student Enrollment Trends"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_section_label(slide, "Five-Year Enrollment Growth", 2)
    add_footer(slide, 4)

    # Chart data
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2020–21", "2021–22", "2022–23", "2023–24", "2024–25"]
    chart_data.add_series("Total Enrollment", (30800, 31200, 31900, 32100, 32500))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(4.5), Inches(1.2),
        Inches(5.0), Inches(4.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.line.color.rgb = NAVY
    series.format.line.width = Pt(2)
    series.smooth = True

    # Left side summary text
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.3), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.5),
                 "Enrollment Summary", font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=18, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.3),
                 "Total enrollment has grown by 5.5% over the past five years.",
                 font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=13, color=CHARCOAL)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.6), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.3),
                 "Elementary: 18,200 students (56%)", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.3),
                 "Middle School: 8,900 students (27%)", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.4), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.3),
                 "High School: 5,400 students (17%)", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    # Projected enrollment note
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(4.8), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.3),
                 "Projected 2025–26: 33,100 students (+1.9%)", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, bold=True, color=BURGUNDY)


def build_academic_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Academic Performance Metrics"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_section_label(slide, "Standardized Assessment Results", 3)
    add_footer(slide, 5)

    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Reading", "Mathematics", "Science", "Social Studies"]
    chart_data.add_series("District Average (%)", (78, 72, 74, 80))
    chart_data.add_series("State Average (%)", (71, 65, 68, 73))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(4.5), Inches(1.2),
        Inches(5.0), Inches(4.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_0 = plot.series[0]
    series_0.format.fill.solid()
    series_0.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    series_1 = plot.series[1]
    series_1.format.fill.solid()
    series_1.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD

    # Left summary
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.3), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.5),
                 "Performance Highlights", font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=18, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    highlights = [
        ("Reading Proficiency:", "78% — 7 points above state average"),
        ("Mathematics Proficiency:", "72% — 7 points above state average"),
        ("Science Proficiency:", "74% — 6 points above state average"),
        ("Social Studies Proficiency:", "80% — 7 points above state average"),
    ]
    y = Inches(2.1)
    for title, detail in highlights:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.1), y, Inches(3.8), Inches(0.25),
                     title, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=12, bold=True, color=BURGUNDY)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(3.8), Inches(0.25),
                     detail, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
        y += Inches(0.6)


def build_graduation_rates(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Graduation Rates"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_section_label(slide, "Four-Year Graduation Rate", 4)
    add_footer(slide, 6)

    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Class of '21", "Class of '22", "Class of '23", "Class of '24"]
    chart_data.add_series("Graduation Rate (%)", (89.2, 90.5, 91.8, 93.1))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(4.5), Inches(1.2),
        Inches(5.0), Inches(4.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY

    # Left summary cards
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.3), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.5),
                 "Graduation Milestones", font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=18, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    metrics = [
        ("93.1%", "Current 4-Year Rate"),
        ("+3.9 pts", "Improvement Since '21"),
        ("96.2%", "5-Year Adjusted Rate"),
        ("87%", "College Enrollment (Class of '24)"),
    ]
    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(metrics):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + col * Inches(4.5)
        top = Inches(2.1) + row * Inches(1.3)

        card = add_card(slide, left, top, Inches(4.3), Inches(1.1), bg_color=CREAM, border_color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.6),
                     value, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=30, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.75), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.3),
                     label, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_standardized_tests(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Standardized Test Scores"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_section_label(slide, "Comparative Performance Analysis", 5)
    add_footer(slide, 7)

    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Grade 3 Reading", "Grade 5 Math", "Grade 8 Science", "Algebra I"]
    chart_data.add_series("District (%)", (76, 71, 73, 69))
    chart_data.add_series("State (%)", (68, 62, 64, 58))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2),
        Inches(9.0), Inches(3.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    s0 = plot.series[0]
    s0.format.fill.solid()
    s0.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    s1 = plot.series[1]
    s1.format.fill.solid()
    s1.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD

    # Summary text below chart
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.0), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.35),
                 "Key Findings", font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=16, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    findings = [
        "District outperforms state average in all four assessed areas.",
        "Algebra I proficiency shows the largest gap — targeted intervention planned for 2025–26.",
        "Grade 3 Reading remains a strength area with consistent growth year over year.",
    ]
    y = Inches(5.4)
    for f in findings:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.1), y, CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.3),
                     f"• {f}", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=11, color=CHARCOAL)
        y += Inches(0.35)


def build_teacher_quality(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Teacher Quality & Retention"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_section_label(slide, "Workforce Development", 6)
    add_footer(slide, 8)

    # Stats cards row
    stats = [
        ("94.3%", "Retention Rate"),
        ("72%", "Advanced Degrees"),
        ("4.2 yrs", "Avg. Tenure"),
        ("100%", "Fully Certified"),
    ]
    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(stats):
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + i * Inches(2.4)
        card = add_card(slide, left, Inches(1.3), Inches(2.2), Inches(1.5), bg_color=CREAM, border_color=GOLD)

        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), Inches(1.45), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.7),
                     value, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=32, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), Inches(2.15), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.4),
                     label, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Retention chart
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024"]
    chart_data.add_series("Retention Rate (%)", (91.5, 92.8, 93.1, 93.7, 94.3))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.2),
        Inches(9.0), Inches(3.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.line.color.rgb = BURGUNDY
    series.format.line.width = Pt(2)

    # Bottom note

                 "Teacher retention has improved steadily; professional development investment is a key driver.",
                 font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)


def build_budget_overview(prs):

        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:

                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_section_label(slide, "Fiscal Year 2024–25 Summary", 7)
    add_footer(slide, 9)

    # Big numbers row

        ("$312M", "Total Budget"),
        ("$186M", "Instructional"),
        ("$68M", "Operations"),
        ("$58M", "Capital & Debt"),
    ]
    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(big_stats):
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + i * Inches(2.4)
        card = add_card(slide, left, Inches(1.3), Inches(2.2), Inches(1.5), bg_color=NAVY)

        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), Inches(1.45), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.7),
                     value, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=32, bold=True, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), Inches(2.15), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.4),
                     label, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Budget trend chart
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["FY 20", "FY 21", "FY 22", "FY 23", "FY 24"]
    chart_data.add_series("Total Budget ($M)", (278, 285, 292, 301, 312))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.2),
        Inches(4.5), Inches(3.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]

    series.format.fill.solid()

                 "Budget Allocation", font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=16, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    allocations = [
        ("Instructional Programs:", "$186M (59.6%)"),
        ("Support Services:", "$42M (13.5%)"),
        ("Operations & Maintenance:", "$68M (21.8%)"),
        ("Capital Projects:", "$16M (5.1%)"),
    ]
    y = Inches(3.7)
    for title, detail in allocations:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.4), y, Inches(4.0), Inches(0.25),
                     title, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=11, bold=True, color=BURGUNDY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.4), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.25),
                     detail, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
        y += Inches(0.6)


def build_revenue_sources(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Revenue Sources"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_section_label(slide, "Funding Composition", 8)
    add_footer(slide, 10)

    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Local Property Tax", "State Aid", "Federal Grants", "Other Revenue"]
    chart_data.add_series("Revenue ($M)", (142, 98, 36, 36))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2),
        Inches(4.5), Inches(4.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    data_labels.number_format = '#,##0'

    colors = [NAVY, BURGUNDY, GOLD, MEDIUM_GRAY]
    for i, series in enumerate(plot.series):
        series.format.fill.solid()
        series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[i]

    # Right side details
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.2), Inches(1.3), Inches(4.3), Inches(0.35),
                 "Revenue Breakdown", font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=16, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    sources = [
        ("Local Property Tax:", "$142M — 45.5%"),
        ("State Aid:", "$98M — 31.4%"),
        ("Federal Grants:", "$36M — 11.5%"),
        ("Other Revenue:", "$36M — 11.5%"),
    ]
    y = Inches(2.0)
    for title, detail in sources:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.4), y, Inches(4.0), Inches(0.3),
                     title, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=12, bold=True, color=BURGUNDY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.4), y + Inches(0.3), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.3),
                     detail, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
        y += Inches(0.75)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.2), Inches(5.8), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(5.4), Inches(0.3),
                 "Property tax levy increased 2.1% this fiscal year.", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

def build_key_challenges(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Key Challenges & Mitigation"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_section_label(slide, "Addressing Critical Issues", 16)
    add_footer(slide, 18)

    challenges = [
        ("Enrollment Growth Pressure", "Rapid enrollment increase strains facility capacity.", "Accelerate new school planning; optimize current space utilization."),
        ("Teacher Recruitment Shortage", "Difficulty filling STEM and special education positions.", "Enhance recruitment incentives; partner with universities for pipeline programs."),
        ("Achievement Gap Persistence", "Subgroup performance gaps remain above district average.", "Expand targeted interventions; increase professional development on culturally responsive teaching."),
        ("Budget Constraints", "Rising costs outpace revenue growth in key areas.", "Prioritize instructional spending; pursue additional grant funding opportunities."),
    ]

    for i, (challenge, issue, mitigation) in enumerate(challenges):
        top = Inches(1.2) + i * Inches(1.45)

        card = add_card(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, top, CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(1.3), bg_color=CREAM, border_color=GOLD)

        # Number badge
        badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.45),
                                       Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4))
        badge.fill.solid()
        badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = BURGUNDY
        badge.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.25), top + Inches(0.47), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.36),
                     str(i + 1), font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.8), top + Inches(0.25), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.35),
                     challenge, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=14, bold=True, color=BURGUNDY)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.8), top + Inches(0.65), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.3),
                     f"Issue: {issue}", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(4.2), top + Inches(0.25), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(4.7), Inches(0.35),
                     "Mitigation:", font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=12, bold=True, color=NAVY)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(4.2), top + Inches(0.65), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(4.7), Inches(0.3),
                     mitigation, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=11, color=CHARCOAL)


def build_action_items(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Action Items & Timeline"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.name = FONT_HEADING
                r.font.size = Pt(28)
                r.font.color.rgb = NAVY

    add_section_label(slide, "Next Steps", 17)
    add_footer(slide, 19)

    actions = [
        ("Q3 2025", "Finalize new middle school design plans and begin site preparation."),
        ("Q4 2025", "Launch expanded teacher recruitment campaign targeting STEM specialists."),
        ("Q1 2026", "Implement new literacy intervention program in all elementary schools."),
        ("Q2 2026", "Complete IT network upgrade across all district buildings."),
    ]

    for i, (quarter, action) in enumerate(actions):
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + (i % 2) * Inches(4.75)
        top = Inches(1.3) + (i // 2) * Inches(2.9)

        card = add_card(slide, left, top, Inches(4.5), Inches(2.6), bg_color=CREAM, border_color=GOLD)

        # Quarter badge
        quarter_badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.15),
                                               Inches(4.2), Pt(3))
        quarter_badge.fill.solid()
        quarter_badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
        quarter_badge.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.35), Inches(4.0), Inches(0.4),
                     quarter, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=18, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.9), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(5.0), Inches(1.4),
                     action, font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=13, color=CHARCOAL)


def build_thank_you_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, NAVY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.9),
                 "Thank You", font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=40, bold=True, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Gold accent bar
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.2), Inches(3.1),
                                 Inches(1.6), Pt(4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.4), Inches(7), Inches(0.5),
                 "District of Excellence", font_name=FONT_ACCENT, font_size=20, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(7), Inches(0.3),
                 "Office of the Superintendent", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=14, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.6), Inches(7), Inches(0.3),
                 "contact@districtexcellence.edu  |  (555) 123-4567", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(6.0), Inches(7), Inches(0.3),
                 "Annual School Board Review — 2024–2025", font_name=FONT_BODY, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_agenda_slide(prs)
    build_district_overview(prs)
    build_enrollment_trends(prs)
    build_academic_performance(prs)
    build_graduation_rates(prs)
    build_standardized_tests(prs)
    build_teacher_quality(prs)
    build_budget_overview(prs)
    build_revenue_sources(prs)
    build_expenditure_breakdown(prs)
    build_capital_projects(prs)
    build_technology_initiatives(prs)
    build_student_support(prs)
    build_equity_metrics(prs)
    build_community_engagement(prs)
    build_strategic_goals(prs)
    build_key_challenges(prs)
    build_action_items(prs)
    build_thank_you_slide(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
